title: Asukas Hair
wikitext:
[]: Asuka's Hair             Quote Post by CJD » Wed Jun 29, 2011 4:28 pm Ok so, this has been bugging me for awhile. Everyone calls Asuka a red head. How?! I look at any scene from the show and her hair is brown. It does have a slight auburn to it, but it's definitely more brown than red to my eyes. I see the correlation with the red and Asuka, and the wiki mentions that her "Red Hair and Blue Eyes" are the reverse of Rei's "Blue hair and red eyes", but I just don't see red hair. So uhh, what gives? PS: I'm not sure whether this fits in the Discussion board or Chit Chat, but I'm thinking Discussion so feel free to move it if it doesn't.

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Wed Jun 29, 2011 4:33 pm Asuka's hair has occupied every shade between strawberry blonde and firetruck red. All of which fall within what is considered a form of red hair. Occasionally she has light brown hair, but it still has enough of a copper tint to it to be a red head.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 29, 2011 4:43 pm In early episodes, she's a red-head/orange hair. In DC/EoE, her hair is more brown-ish depending on the scene. In On-Air episodes, she has orange hair (but the animation and coloring style in general is so OFF compared to the early episodes let alone DC episodes) . Basically, it seriously varies on the episode/animation quality. (Similar to Asuka's breasts and the heights of the Evas. :P ) Shikinami is more auburn-haired, at any rate.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 29, 2011 4:53 pm Constant color shift is basically a given in older productions. Even if the cel painters were consistently using the same paint color for 'default lighting situation', distortions happen every step of the way, including photography, transfer to home video media, and audience's viewing equipment/set-up. (Budgetary constraints would exacerbate the effects of the first two.) Completely digital production offers considerably more control over these sorts of things -- though viewing set-up is still going to introduce variations. Another thing to keep in mind is that if atmospheric/lighting effects are applied to a scene, that is going to affect the way that colors look. (And we all know what happens when people forget about everyday things like ambient lighting... ) For all the griping over Asuka's hair, I'm surprised nobody complains that Eva-01's color wavers between reddish-purple and bluish-purple. (Well, maybe plamodel dorks somewhere might have.)

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Wed Jun 29, 2011 4:54 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Shikinami is more auburn-haired, at any rate.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 29, 2011 5:06 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Wed Jun 29, 2011 5:09 pm Reichu wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Jun 29, 2011 5:11 pm [quote=" Reichu":itl3sh01][/quote:itl3sh01] No wonder I can't stand her.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Wed Jun 29, 2011 5:16 pm On a related note, why do people say that Misato has purple hair? It looks to me to be black with a blueish tint. And Kaji's is brown with a green tint.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Jun 29, 2011 5:20 pm TehDonutKing wrote: On a related note, why do people say that Misato has purple hair? It looks to me to be black with a blueish tint.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jun 29, 2011 5:29 pm http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Generalization

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Wed Jun 29, 2011 5:30 pm Ornette wrote: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Generalization

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Wed Jun 29, 2011 5:38 pm Azathoth wrote: Ok so, this has been bugging me for awhile. Everyone calls Misato purple-haired. How?! I look at any scene from the show and her hair is indigo. It does have a slight violet to it, but it's definitely more indigo than purple to my eyes. I better make a thread about it. Incidentally, surely Jimbo or someone has commented on some point the correlation between the color purple and terrible mothers?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Jun 29, 2011 5:55 pm CJD wrote: Ow bro, uncalled for.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 29, 2011 5:58 pm TehDonutKing wrote: On a related note, why do people say that Misato has purple hair? It looks to me to be black with a blueish tint.

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Wed Jun 29, 2011 8:57 pm Reichu wrote: Because it is purple. Purple = base color, dark purple (or black, depending on image contrast) = shadows, lavender = highlights. [..]

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Wed Jun 29, 2011 9:14 pm Azathoth wrote: Yeah, sorry to get up in your grill, but it's like the third time this month and I'm just as confused by it every time. I don't know if you people have just met only really carroty gingers or are basing your concept of red hair on Yoko Littner or what...

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Wed Jun 29, 2011 9:16 pm Tarnsman wrote: It's not even a generalization. Asuka's hair does stay with in the very broad range of what is considered "red" hair. With the exceptions of when it's pure blonde or pure brown.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Wed Jun 29, 2011 10:04 pm symbv wrote: Ornette was right at least for Misato's hair -- I group purple, violet, indigo all under the category of purple for example.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Jun 30, 2011 1:16 am I trolled people with this once. Look, the picture you see on the front page of the wiki, the group shot? Asuka's hair is sienna there, according to my handy-dandy "I'm fucking colorblind, what fucking color is this bullshit?" color analyzer (curse my eyes). It is also often a sandy brown. RL redheads, judging by wikipedia, often have sienna or sandy brown hair.
